inline_comments.message:
I tested again the version 1.5.1 and 1.5.2 with the new server version in the Frankfurt release by using 'kubectl edit pod...' without success.
Using the same URL (https://msb.api.discovery.simpledemo.onap.org:30283/iui/aai-esr-gui/extsys/vim/vimView.html) in the new versions the UI cannot be found (error 404)
The pod logs do not show any problems.
